notes: Christian bishop known from letters of Avitus of Vienne and Cassiodorus, active in early 6th century.

docs.title: Letter 1004
docs.author: Avitus of Vienne
docs.excerpt: Though in truth, the gaze of his devout mind, occupied more with contemplating spiritual things and not overly frightened by the blindness of the outer man, seeks this cure — as far as I can tell — with such moderation that he is concerned more to satisfy those who love him than himself.
